content: Hello, could you please show me the termination clauses for this contract
name: User

function.arguments: {"question":"Please provide the termination clauses for this contract"}
function.name: query_contract

content: The termination clause for this contract states that either party may terminate the Agreement at any time, for any reason, with or without cause, upon fourteen (14) days' prior written notice. Additionally, the Company may terminate the Agreement immediately and without prior notice if the Advisor breaches any of the terms outlined in the contract.
